name: Jermyn the Honest

sheet.name: Jermyn the Honest
sheet.background_story:
Jermyn was a late and curious follower of the Strivers who became fascinated with the power and knowledge of the ancient technologies that The Artificers had uncovered.

While experimenting with the ancient mask that he affixed to his face, he gained the ability to discern truth, but lost the ability to tell lies.

He has ventured to The Wound to discover more about the ancient technologies that have caused his truthful condition.

description:
Jermyn was a late and curious follower of the Strivers who became fascinated with the power and knowledge of the ancient technologies that The Artificers had uncovered.

While experimenting with the ancient mask that he affixed to his face, he gained the ability to discern truth, but lost the ability to tell lies.

He has begun studying the experimetns and findings of The Arcane Council.
